zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Whalesborough於1408年出生在英國可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛時，他的父親Sir John IV Whalesborough40歲，母親Joan Raleigh43歲。他於大約1429年與Lady Matilda Bowes在英國英格蘭可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1481年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾布德享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Whalesborough于1408年出生在英国可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛时，他的父亲Sir John IV Whalesborough40岁，母亲Joan Raleigh43岁。他于大约1429年与Lady Matilda Bowes在英国英格兰可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1481年在英国英格兰可瓦爾布德享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Whalesborough was born in 1408, in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England, his father, Sir John IV Whalesborough, was 40 and his mother, Joan Raleigh, was 43. He married Lady Matilda Bowes about 1429, in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1481, in Bude, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Whalesborough est né en 1408, à Whalesborough, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir John IV Whalesborough, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joan Raleigh, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Lady Matilda Bowes environ 1429, à Whalesborough, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1481, à Bude, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Whalesborough 1408 in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John IV Whalesborough 40 und seine Mutter Joan Raleigh 43. Er hat um 1429 in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Lady Matilda Bowes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1481 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Bude, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Whalesborough è nato il nel 1408 nel Whalesborough, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Sir John IV Whalesborough, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Joan Raleigh, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Lady Matilda Bowes circa 1429, nel Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1481, nel Bude, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Whalesboroughが1408年にイギリスコルンワルウイレスボロウで生まれた時，父Sir John IV Whalesboroughは40歳，母Joan Raleighは43歳であった。約1429年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルウイレスボロウでLady Matilda Bowesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1481年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルブドで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Whalesborough(이)가 1408년 영국 코른월 화알스버루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John IV Whalesborough(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Raleigh(은)는 43세였다. 그는 대략 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 화알스버루에서 Lady Matilda Bowes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1481년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 부드에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Whalesborough nasceu em 1408, em Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John IV Whalesborough, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Joan Raleigh, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Matilda Bowes aproximadamente 1429, em Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1481, em Bude, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Whalesborough родился в 1408 г. в местности уэлесбороую, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John IV Whalesborough было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Raleigh, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Matilda Bowes около 1429 г. в местности уэлесбороую, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1481 г. в местности буд, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Whalesborough nació en 1408, en Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John IV Whalesborough, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Joan Raleigh, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Lady Matilda Bowes aproximadamente 1429, en Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1481, en Bude, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años.
